title: task
description:
Implement per-peer OSCORE security context storage and management. Each peer requires its own sender/recipient context derived from EDHOC key establishment.

Required components:
1. Security context storage (struct context from uoscore-uedhoc)
2. Context lookup by peer EUI-64
3. Sender sequence number (SSN) management and NVM persistence
4. Context freshness checking per RFC 8613 section 7.2.1
5. Replay protection via the library's server_replay_window_t

Use uoscore-uedhoc library (modules/lib/uoscore-uedhoc/):
- oscore_context_init() for context setup
- check_context_freshness() for SSN overflow detection

Parent: project-LICHEN-r6fu.2
close_reason: Implemented per-peer OSCORE security context storage with EUI-64 indexing, NVM persistence callbacks for SSN, and context freshness checking per RFC 8613 Section 7.2.1. Added: oscore_ctx_create_with_eui64(), oscore_ctx_set_peer_eui64(), oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64(), oscore_ctx_check_freshness(), oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(), oscore_nvm_register_callbacks(). Added enum oscore_freshness and NVM callback types. Extended oscore_ctx struct with peer_eui64 field. Added comprehensive tests.
